text.title: Trade-off Stakeholder Communication Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end, from raw decision record to validated 4-artefact bundle.

step.name: extract-key-risk
step.input: Decision record (options + criteria + chosen) + reversibility classification
step.action: Distil the single most painful survivable downside of the chosen option into one sentence (24–320 chars). This is the verbatim "key_risk" paragraph that will appear in every artefact.
step.decision-gate: If you cannot name a concrete downside, the decision is not yet ready to brief — return to trade-off-analysis.

step.name: draft-per-role
step.action: Emit four artefacts in parallel: exec_summary (≤120 words, gain + key_risk in lede), pm_brief (roadmap_impact + dependency_changes), engineer_note (sacrificed[] ≥1), ops_delta (runbook_changes + alert_changes). Embed the verbatim key_risk in each body.
step.decision-gate: If two artefacts have identical body text, fail role-fit and rewrite the duplicate.

step.name: convergence-check
step.action: Route to a separate reviewer subagent (opus). Verify: (a) key_risk appears verbatim in all four; (b) exec_summary.word_count ≤120; (c) engineer_note.sacrificed has ≥1 item; (d) bodies differ across roles.
step.decision-gate: Type-1 decision with convergence_check_passed=false → block ADR insert; loop back to step 2.

step.name: adr-insert
step.action: Render the Consequences section of the parent ADR by combining: engineer_note.body + sacrificed[] bullet list + key_risk callout. Drop the per-role artefacts into the briefing distribution channel (email / Slack / docs).
step.output: ADR with populated Consequences section + distributed artefacts

step.name: post-decision-review
step.input: ADR + bundle + trigger events 30/90 days later
step.action: Run validator `validate-trade-off-stakeholder-communication.py`; check whether the predicted key_risk materialised. Append a one-paragraph review block to the ADR.
step.output: ADR with post-decision review block; pass/fail signal for the methodology itself
